ABOUT
French Design Award
2026 International Design Award
REGISTER NOW
2026 OPEN NOW FOR SUBMISSIONS

The French Design Award was established in France by the International Award Association. The French Design Award is committed to giving global designers a broader platform to convey their design concepts, display excellent design works, and lead global design innovation. The French Design Award Juries are composed of world-renowned design experts and professors, representing the world's first-class design appreciation level. Winning the French Design Award is equivalent to being highly recognized by world-renowned design masters.

Winners
STANDARD OF REVIEW
Aesthetics
The entry must demonstrate the concept of the design and how to achieve the final visual effect, such as form, shape, color, texture, finishing, material, etc.
Design Impact
The entry must be able to express the positive impact it creates for the end user and/or the society.
Innovation
The entry must be able to illustrate the originality of the design and how it benefits the end user.
Ergonomics
The entry should have a good interaction with the user.
Learn more
JURY
The jury's task is to provide all participants with the most in-depth feedback possible on the quality of their submission.
A geographic and cultural mix makes for more interesting discussions among the jury and helps avoid unconscious cultural biases. Design is changing and so should the jury: each year, a different group of experts is invited to serve as jurors, bringing with them a fresh perspective.

Jury Panel

The French Design Award Juries are composed of world-renowned design professors and design experts. It will strictly evaluate thousands of products every year, and select excellent design works from the aspects of design aesthetics, innovation, user experience, social impact, environmental protection, etc. , the jury strictly abides by the judging ethics, and will not know the applicants of the entries during the judging, so as to ensure that excellent design works can stand out.

About us
FRENCH DESIGN AWARD

The French Design Award was established in France by the International Award Association. The French Design Award is committed to giving global designers a broader platform to convey their design concepts, display excellent design works, and lead global design innovation. The French Design Award Juries are composed of world-renowned design experts and professors, representing the world's first-class design appreciation level. The French Design Award is a prestigious global event that draws participation from over thousands of enterprises worldwide, including Fortune 500 companies and leading brands across various industries. Renowned for its rigorous selection process, the awards celebrate the pinnacle of creativity and innovation in design. It's an honor that has been sought after by giants like Kao, YA-MAN, Baidu, Mercedes-Benz, and China Mobile, as well as by globally acclaimed designers. Winning this accolade is not just a testament to the quality of work but also a significant boost to a brand's international standing and recognition.

Play Video
On-site review
Design Talk Resonance Hub for Innovative Minds
Bring together global design leaders and avant-garde forces. Each edition of the Design Forum creates a platform for deep intellectual exchange through themed explorations. Engage in keynote speeches, juror insights into design vision, award-winning case studies, and roundtable dialoguesвЂ”exploring the symbiotic frontiers of design with technology, business, and humanity. Experience cutting-edge industry thinking live, ignite creative energy, and witness the infinite possibilities of design-driven futures.
Milan Design Week
French Design Award (FDA) -Winning Product Exhibited at Milan Design Week 2025
A Strong Presence at ZipZone, Tortona Design Week вЂ“ Via Tortona 26
Milan, Italy вЂ“ April 7вЂ“13, 2025

We were proud to exhibit our French Design Award (FDA) winning product during Milan Design Week 2025, as part of ZipZone Events under the umbrella of Tortona Design Week. Held at Via Tortona 26, one of the city's most visited design destinations, the exhibition ran for seven days and welcomed a diverse audience of professionals, students, and design enthusiasts from around the world.

Our space offered a straightforward and honest presentation of the product вЂ” a design recognized for its elegance, innovation, and practical value. The display focused entirely on the product's form, function, and story, allowing visitors to engage closely with the idea behind the award-winning creation.

Testimonials
I am deeply honored and humbled to accept this prestigious award. Receiving this award is a testament to the dedication and hard work of not just myself, but also my colleagues, mentors, and supporters who have stood by me throughout my journey. Their guidance, encouragement, and unwavering belief in my abilities have been invaluable. This award serves as a reminder of the importance of innovation in our work. It motivates me to continue striving for excellence and pushing the boundaries of what is possible.
James Brown, Owner of Innovate Design Studio, United States
Being immensely grateful to the judges and organizers of this esteemed award for acknowledging our work among a pool of incredibly talented designers, winning the French Design Award means a lot to me. This recognition inspires us to continue pushing the boundaries of creativity and innovation in the field of design.
Robert Jones, Independent Designer, UK
Winning this award is the best thing ever happen to me for this year, I want to express my sincerest thanks to our clients and collaborators for entrusting us with their visions and allowing us to turn them into reality. Their trust and collaboration have been invaluable to our success. I dedicate this award to the power of design to inspire, innovate, and make a meaningful impact on the world around us. Let us continue to harness this power to create a better, more beautiful future for all.
Sarah Davis, Independent Designer, United States

FAQ
Order
Refund Policy

After submitting the registration, if the registration fee has already been paid, it can be applied for a refund before the deadline of the award. If the entry has already entered the judging stage, it is no longer possible to apply for a refund.

Admission terms and conditions

The French Design Award presumes that every submission is a unique creation and entrants possess all requisite rights either by submitting their own work or by obtaining consent from clients or other stakeholders. Should an entrant submit a project without the necessary rights, they will be deemed ineligible for the French Design Award and will not be held accountable for any copyright violations.

All copyrights and associated rights are retained by the entrant. Entrants acknowledge and accept that any work submitted to the competition by The French Design Award and its media affiliates is intended solely for promotional activities related to the competition, which may include exhibitions, print, and digital media that are in direct connection with the competition.

Submitting entries on time and paying the entry fee as outlined here ensures that the work of entrants will be evaluated and considered for accolades. The French Design Award provides no additional guarantees or warranties and hereby explicitly renounces all implied warranties.

In the case of receiving an award, the French Design Award has full discretion over how and when to announce the nominations and awards. Participants are aware that not all awards may be presented or declared in the same manner or format.
